Description:
Attention configuration.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.AttentionConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: compilation-config
Default:
{'mode': None,
'debug_dump_path': None, 'cache_dir': '',
'compile_cache_save_format': 'binary', 'backend': 'vll
m_ascend.compilation.compiler_interface.AscendCompiler
', 'custom_ops': [], 'ir_enable_torch_wrap': None,
'splitting_ops': None, 'compile_mm_encoder': False,
'cudagraph_mm_encoder': False,
'encoder_cudagraph_token_budgets': [],
'encoder_cudagraph_max_vision_items_per_batch': 0,
'encoder_cudagraph_max_frames_per_batch': None,
'compile_sizes': None, 'compile_ranges_endpoints':
None, 'inductor_compile_config':
{'enable_auto_functionalized_v2': False,
'size_asserts': False, 'alignment_asserts': False,
'scalar_asserts': False, 'combo_kernels': True,
'benchmark_combo_kernel': True}, 'inductor_passes':
{}, 'cudagraph_mode': None,
'cudagraph_num_of_warmups': 0,
'cudagraph_capture_sizes': None,
'cudagraph_copy_inputs': False,
'cudagraph_specialize_lora': True,
'use_inductor_graph_partition': None, 'pass_config':
{}, 'max_cudagraph_capture_size': None,

Description:
torch.compile` and cudagraph capture configuration
for the model.
As a shorthand, one can append compilation arguments
via
-cc.parameter=argument such as `-cc.mode=3` (same as
`-cc='{"mode":3}'`).
You can specify the full compilation config like so:
`{"mode": 3, "cudagraph_capture_sizes": [1, 2, 4, 8]}`
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.CompilationConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: ec-transfer-config
Description:
The configurations for distributed EC cache transfer.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.ECTransferConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: kernel-config

Kernel configuration.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.KernelConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: kv-events-config
Description:
The configurations for event publishing.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.KVEventsConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: kv-transfer-config
Description:
The configurations for distributed KV cache transfer.

ig/#vllm.config.KVTransferConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: optimization-level
Description:
The optimization level. These levels trade startup
time cost for performance, with -O0 having the best
startup time and -O3 having the best performance. -O2
is used by default. See OptimizationLevel for full
description.

Name: performance-mode
Description:
Performance mode for runtime behavior, 'balanced' is
the default. 'interactivity' favors low end-to-end
per-request latency at small batch sizes (fine-grained
CUDA graphs, latency-oriented kernels). 'throughput'
favors aggregate tokens/sec at high concurrency
(larger CUDA graphs, more aggressive batching,
throughput-oriented kernels).

Name: profiler-config
Description:
Profiling configuration.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.ProfilerConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: reasoning-config
Description:
The configurations for reasoning model.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.ReasoningConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

Name: spec-method
Description:
The name of the speculative method to use. If users
provide and set the `model` param, the speculative
method type will be detected automatically if
possible, if `model` param is not provided, the method
name must be provided.
If using `ngram` method, the related configuration
`prompt_lookup_max` and `prompt_lookup_min` should be
considered.

Name: spec-model
Description:
The name of the draft model, eagle head, or additional
weights, if provided.

Name: spec-tokens
Description:
The number of speculative tokens, if provided. It will
default to the number in the draft model config if
present, otherwise, it is required.

Name: speculative-config
Description:
Speculative decoding configuration.
API docs: https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/api/vllm/conf
ig/#vllm.config.SpeculativeConfig
Should either be a valid JSON string or JSON keys
passed individually.

ig/#vllm.config.StructuredOutputsConfig

Name: ec_connector
Description: The EC connector for transmitting EC caches between vLLM instances.

Name: ec_buffer_device
Description: The device used by EC connector to buffer the EC cache (currently only 'cuda').

Name: ec_buffer_size
Description: The buffer size for TorchDistributedConnector (~1GB recommended).

Name: ec_role
Description: Whether this vLLM instance produces, consumes EC cache, or both.

Name: ec_rank
Description: The rank of this vLLM instance in the EC cache transfer.

Name: ec_parallel_size
Description: The number of parallel instances for EC cache transfer.

Name: ec_ip
Description: The EC connector IP address.

Name: ec_port
Description: The EC connector port.

Name: ec_connector_extra_config
Description: Any extra config that the EC connector may need.

Name: ec_connector_module_path
Description: The Python module path to dynamically load the EC connector from.

Name: enable_kv_cache_events
Description: If True, enable KV cache events for tracking block storage and removal.

Name: publisher
Description: The publisher to use for publishing KV events: 'null' or 'zmq'.

Name: endpoint
Description: The ZMQ endpoint to use for publishing KV events.

Name: replay_endpoint
Description: The ZMQ endpoint to use for replaying KV events.

Name: buffer_steps
Description: The number of steps to cache for the replay endpoint.

Name: hwm
Description: The ZMQ high water mark for the event publisher.

Name: max_queue_size
Description: The maximum number of events to queue while waiting for publishing.

Name: topic
Description: The topic to use for the event publisher.

Name: kv_connector
Description: The KV connector for transmitting KV caches between vLLM instances.

Name: kv_buffer_device
Description: The device used by KV connector to buffer the KV cache: 'cuda', 'cpu', or 'xpu'.

Name: kv_buffer_size
Description: The buffer size for TorchDistributedConnector (~1GB recommended).

Name: kv_role
Description: Whether this vLLM instance produces, consumes KV cache, or both.

Name: kv_rank
Description: The rank of this vLLM instance in the KV cache transfer.

Name: kv_parallel_size
Description: The number of parallel instances for KV cache transfer.

Name: kv_ip
Description: The KV connector IP address.

Name: kv_port
Description: The KV connector port.

Name: kv_connector_extra_config
Description: Any extra config that the KV connector may need.

Name: kv_connector_module_path
Description: The Python module path to dynamically load the KV connector from.

Name: enable_permute_local_kv
Description: Experimental flag to enable HND to NHD KV transfer.

Name: kv_load_failure_policy
Description: Policy for handling KV cache load failures: 'recompute' or 'fail'.

Name: profiler
Description: Which profiler to use: 'torch' or 'cuda'.

Name: torch_profiler_dir
Description: Directory to save torch profiler traces.

Name: torch_profiler_with_stack
Description: If True, enables stack tracing in the torch profiler.

Name: torch_profiler_with_flops
Description: If True, enables FLOPS counting in the torch profiler.

Name: torch_profiler_use_gzip
Description: If True, saves torch profiler traces in gzip format.

Name: torch_profiler_dump_cuda_time_total
Description: If True, dumps total CUDA time in torch profiler traces.

Name: torch_profiler_record_shapes
Description: If True, records tensor shapes in the torch profiler.

Name: torch_profiler_with_memory
Description: If True, enables memory profiling in the torch profiler.

Name: ignore_frontend
Description: If True, disables front-end profiling of AsyncLLM when using the 'torch' profiler.

Name: delay_iterations
Description: Number of engine iterations to skip before starting profiling.

Name: max_iterations
Description: Maximum number of engine iterations to profile after starting.

Name: warmup_iterations
Description: Number of warmup iterations for PyTorch profiler schedule.

Name: active_iterations
Description: Number of active iterations for PyTorch profiler schedule.

Name: wait_iterations
Description: Number of wait iterations for PyTorch profiler schedule.

Name: reasoning_parser
Description: The name of the ReasoningParser to use for this model.

Name: reasoning_start_str
Description: String that indicates the start of reasoning content.

Name: reasoning_end_str
Description: String that indicates the end of reasoning content.

Name: num_speculative_tokens
Description: The number of speculative tokens, if provided.

Name: model
Description: The name of the draft model, eagle head, or additional weights, if provided.

Name: method
Description: The name of the speculative method to use.

Name: draft_tensor_parallel_size
Description: The degree of tensor parallelism for the draft model.

Name: quantization
Description: Quantization method used for the draft model weights.

Name: moe_backend
Description: MoE backend to use for the draft model.

Name: attention_backend
Description: Attention backend to use for the draft model.

Name: max_model_len
Description: The maximum model length of the draft model.

Name: revision
Description: The specific model version to use for the draft model.

Name: code_revision
Description: The specific revision to use for the draft model code on Hugging Face Hub.

Name: disable_padded_drafter_batch
Description: Disable input padding for speculative decoding.

Name: use_local_argmax_reduction
Description: Use vocab-parallel local argmax instead of all-gathering full logits.

Name: prompt_lookup_max
Description: Maximum size of ngram token window when using Ngram proposer.

Name: prompt_lookup_min
Description: Minimum size of ngram token window when using Ngram proposer.

Name: parallel_drafting
Description: Enable parallel drafting.

Name: rejection_sample_method
Description: The rejection sampling method to use: 'standard' or 'synthetic'.

Description: Per-position unconditional acceptance rates for synthetic rejection sampling.

Name: suffix_decoding_max_tree_depth

Name: suffix_decoding_max_spec_factor

Name: suffix_decoding_min_token_prob

Name: backend
Description: The backend to use for weight transfer during RL training.
